meta.notes: type: http = Scrapling Tier 1 first. type: dynamic = Scrapling Tier 2 first. day_rotation: 1/2/3 = which day in 3-day cycle to scrape. Same domain never appears twice on same day. Monthly sources only run on 1st of month. Weekly sources only run if 7 days since last scraped. track: tech/finance/both — used by email generator to pick correct tone.
